allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/bank/send-code' -Method POST -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("Status: " + $r.StatusCode\); Write-Output $r.Content } catch { Write-Output \("Status: " + $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\); $s = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); if \($s\) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($s\); Write-Output $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message } })
